[ 1 ]
TAMIL NADU
GOVERNMENT GAZETTE
PUBLISHED  BY  AUTHORITY
No. 16A]	
chennai, Wednesday, April 17, 2019	
	
	
	
	
	
Chithirai 4, Vikari, Thiruvalluvar Aandu–2050
Part VI–Section  1
(Supplement)
Notifications   by   heads  of  departments, etc.
DTP—VI-1 A-Sup. (16A)—1
	
©	
[Regd. No. TN/CCN/467/2012-14.
	 GOVERNMENT  OF  TAMIL  NADU	
[R. Dis. No. 197/2009.
	
2019	
[Price :  Rs. 8.00 Paise.
JUDICIAL NOTIFICATIONS
Destruction of Records in the Office of The City Civil Court, Chennai.
(Dis.No. 4088/2019/R.K.I)
no. vi(1)/199/2019.
It is hereby notified for the information of parties and witnesses that under the rule for the destruction of Part-I records 
framed by High Court of Judicature at Madras under V of 1917, printed at pages 311 to 317 of the volume I of the Civil Rules of 
Practice and cirular order, all documents produced by them and filed as exhibits in the original suits and connected appeals, original 
petitions and Applications in the City Civil Court at Chennai mentioned in the schedule hereto and all other documents which have 
been tendered but either have not been taken or rejected in the original Suits. Application and Original Petitions mentioned in the 
said schedule be destroyed after thirty days from the date of publication.
List of Part-I Records in Original Suits for Destruction for the year-1997

(Dis.No. 4088/2019/R.K.I)
no. vi(1)/200/2019. 
It is hereby notified for the information of parties and witnesses that under the rule for the destruction of Part-I records 
framed by High Court of Judicature at Madras under V of 1917, printed at pages 311 to 317 of the volume I of the Civil Rules 
of Practice and cirular order, all documents produced by them and filed as exhibits in the original suits and connected appeals, 
original petitions and Applications in the City Civil Court at Chennai mentioned in the schedule hereto and all other documents 
which have been tendered but either have not been taken or rejected in the original Suits. Application and Original Petitions 
mentioned in the said schedule be destroyed after thirty days from the date of publication.
List of Part-I Records to be Destroyed Record Destruction Register of Original Suits for 
Year 1998 in the City Civil Court, Chennai-104
